Plaintiff Eric Foster'S Motion To Augment Expert Witness Designation
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Siddharth Jhans, Esq. of The Farrise Law Firm, Tel. 213.434.3586, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The party stipulated to the Pro Tem Judge. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF ERIC FOSTER'S Motion To Augment Expert Witness Designation is granted in part and denied in part as follows:
(1) The motion is granted as to augmentation of the expert witness designations with all parties having leave to augment their expert witness designations. The Court finds good cause exists to permit augmentation by plaintiff and that defendants will not suffer substantial prejudice as a result. Similarly, good cause further exists to permit augmentation by defendants in response to the designation of Professor Johnson. The parties are to exchange augmented designations within seven (7) days and to complete expert discovery no less than fifteen (15) days prior to the new trial date. The Court notes that the order assigning the discovery referee does not bar the Court from hearing motions pertaining to the designation of experts, and the present motion does not involve the type of complex fact based issues best determined by the referee. Any issue as to the admissibility of Professor Johnson's testimony is the province of the trial court and not a proper basis for refusing an augmented designation.
(2) The request for sanctions is denied.
Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
